# llms.txt

This website is "滿願藏庫" (zambala-tibetan.com.tw).

- Primary language: zh-Hant (Traditional Chinese)
- Purpose: Online landing pages for Buddhist wealth/auspicious puja participation, with payment redirected to a third-party payment provider (ECPay).

## Key pages
- / (Home)
- /deity/yellow
- /deity/mahashri
- /deity/ganapati
- /deity/kurukulla
- /deity/padmasambhava
- /deity/green-tara
- /pay
- /sutra
- /proof

## Notes
- The site content is informational and religious in nature.
- No sensitive personal data is collected directly on the site.
